description_long: This is a rectangular, upright grocery bag made from a durable, flexible material, likely recycled vinyl or tarp, with a glossy blue and white exterior. The front features bold, oversized white text on a blue background, a black vertical zipper, and a QR code near the bottom. The bag has two sturdy black loop handles at the top and two longer black straps on the back, allowing it to be carried by hand or worn as a backpack. The back side displays a vertical yellow stripe and more white text on blue, with the straps securely stitched to the body. The bag appears to be empty or only lightly filled, maintaining a structured but slightly collapsed shape. The surface is smooth and slightly reflective, suggesting water resistance and easy cleaning.
description: A blue and white rectangular grocery bag with black handles and backpack straps, featuring bold text, a zipper, and a QR code on the front. The bag is made of glossy, durable material and appears empty or lightly filled.
description_view_0: Front view shows bold white text on blue, a black zipper, QR code, and two loop handles.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the bag's depth, the edge of the white text, and the black backpack straps.
description_view_2: Back view displays a vertical yellow stripe, more white text, and the full length of the black backpack straps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the yellow stripe, bag's depth, and the attachment of the straps.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Large white text, QR code, and a small label with 'TAPE' visible on the front; no specific brand logo.
